hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook codex SessionStart; else exec orca hook codex SessionStart; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook codex UserPromptSubmit; else exec orca hook codex UserPromptSubmit; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook codex PreToolUse; else exec orca hook codex PreToolUse; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook codex PermissionRequest; else exec orca hook codex PermissionRequest; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook codex PostToolUse; else exec orca hook codex PostToolUse; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook codex Stop; else exec orca hook codex Stop; fi'
